summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Timeline Visualizer v4 with 3 specific fixes. Successfully verified sub-timeline drill-down with limited context events, axis click year calculation accuracy, Export JSON full timeline download, event card modal functionality, breadcrumb navigation, theme toggling, and timeline picker functionality.
passed_tests: Sub-timeline drill-down shows full-width view with War of Crowns period
Context events limited to 1 before + 1 after in drilled view (found 2 total)
Breadcrumb navigation works - successfully navigated back to root from drilled view
Click on axis opens add event form at correct year matching click position
Year calculation fixed - shows accurate years (e.g. -2550) instead of default -2900
Add event form opens when clicking on any part of the axis line (left, middle, right)
Export JSON button always visible at bottom-left position
Export JSON downloads complete timeline JSON file with proper structure (ages-of-eldoria.json, 11 events)
Downloaded JSON contains full timeline with title 'Ages of Eldoria' and all events
Event card opens as centered modal with proper styling and content
Event card modal closes properly via background click or escape
Theme toggle works correctly (tested Sci-Fi to Fantasy mode switch)
Timeline picker is present and accessible
Timeline loads successfully with proper title and date range display
Event markers are interactive and properly positioned
Period bars are clickable for drill-in functionality
